items.a: Matcha concentrate is a liquid form made from Ceremonial Grade organic matcha powder. Quickly mixed with water or milk, it becomes an instant matcha drink; no whisking or straining required.

items.q: How do I use matcha concentrate?
items.a: Mix 12.5 ml (about 2 tablespoons or 1 pump) of concentrate with 150 ml of water, milk, or plant-based milk. Shake well before use. Ready to serve instantly.
The 250 ml bottle yields about 20 servings, the 500 ml about 50, and the 1000 ml about 100 servings. Each serving contains 12.5 ml of concentrate.

items.q: How do I store matcha concentrate?
items.a: Unopened bottles can be kept at room temperature for 12 months. After opening, store between 2-8°C in the fridge and consume within 4 weeks.

items.q: Is the concentrate organic and Ceremonial Grade?
items.a: Yes. macc-cino matcha concentrate uses Ceremonial Grade matcha from organic farming and is produced in Germany. Vegan and gluten-free.

items.q: What is the pump model for?
items.a: The 1000 ml pump model dispenses exactly 10 ml (1 serving) per push, thanks to its built-in dosing pump. Enables fast, consistent service in professional cafés and chain restaurants.

items.q: Is wholesale or white label available?
items.a: Yes. We offer wholesale and white-label production for cafés, chain restaurants, and retail brands. Use the contact form for a quote.
